scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); function rmDir(dir) { if (fs.existsSync(dir)) { fs.readdirSync(dir).forEach(f => { const curPath = path.join(dir, f); if (fs.lstatSync(curPath).isDirectory()) rmDir(curPath); else fs.unlinkSync(curPath); }); fs.rmdirSync(dir); } } rmDir('.next'); console.log('.next directory cleaned');"
scripts.clean:lock: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const lockPath = '.next/dev/lock'; if (fs.existsSync(lockPath)) { fs.unlinkSync(lockPath); console.log('Lock file removed'); } else { console.log('Lock file not found'); }"
